Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*******************************************************************
 Fibers of a display map bicategory

 In this file, we calculate the fibers of a display map bicategory

 1. To the fiber
 2. From the fiber
 3. The unit
 4. The counit
 5. The modifications
 6. The biequivalence

 *******************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Logic.DisplayMapBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat. Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.DisplayMapBicatToDispBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.DisplayMapBicatSlice.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.FiberBicategory.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.CleavingOfBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.PseudoTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Modifications.Modification.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Identity.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.Composition.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Biequivalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.ExamplesOfCleavings.DisplayMapBicatCleaving.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope bicategory_scope.

Section FiberOfDisplayMap.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (D : arrow_subbicat B)
          (b : B).

  Let DD : disp_bicat B := disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D.

  Let slice : bicat := disp_map_slice_bicat D b.

  Let fiber : bicat
    := strict_fiber_bicat DD (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b.

  (**
   1. Calculation of operations in fiber
   *)
  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f, g, h: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
pr1 (α • β) = pr1 α • pr1 β

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f, g, h: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
pr1 (α • β) = pr1 α • pr1 β

    apply transportf_disp_map_bicat_cell.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (lunitor f) = lunitor (pr1 f)

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (lunitor f) = lunitor (pr1 f)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (lunitor f) = ?b
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
?b = lunitor (pr1 f)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (lunitor f) = ?b

      apply transportf_disp_map_bicat_cell.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  (disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell
     (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D)
     (id_disp x ;; f) (FiberCategory.idempunitor b)
   •• disp_lunitor f) = lunitor (pr1 f)

    apply id2_left.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1 (linvunitor f) = linvunitor (pr1 f)

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B

w, x, y, z: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: fiber ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1 (lassociator f g h) =
lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)

((id₂ (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h))

               (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D)
               (f ;; local_iso_cleaving_1cell
                       (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving
                          D) (g ;; h)
                       (FiberCategory.idempunitor b))
               (FiberCategory.idempunitor b)))) =
rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
w, x, y, z: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: fiber ⟦ y, z ⟧
((id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h)
  • (id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) ▹ pr1 h))
 • rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h))
• ((pr1 f ◃ id₂ (pr1 g · pr1 h))
   • id₂ (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h))) =
rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)

h: fiber ⟦ y, z ⟧
rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h) =
rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

(g : slice ⟦ b0, c ⟧),
?F₁ a b0 f · ?F₁ b0 c g ==> ?F₁ a c (f · g)

D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B

 exact (λ f, f).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ a b : slice,
slice ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ fiber ⟦ (λ f : slice, f) a, (λ f : slice, f) b ⟧
 exact (λ a₁ a₂ g,
             pr1 g
             ,,
             pr12 g
             ,,
             comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell _)
               (pr22 g)).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B

fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (a b0 : slice) (f g : slice ⟦ a, b0 ⟧),
f ==> g
→ (λ (a₁ a₂ : slice) (g0 : slice ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
   pr1 g0,,
   pr12 g0,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁)) (pr22 g0)) a
    b0 f ==>
  (λ (a₁ a₂ : slice) (g0 : slice ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
   pr1 g0,,
   pr12 g0,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁)) (pr22 g0)) a
    b0 g

D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
a₁, a₂: slice
g₁, g₂: slice ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
β: g₁ ==> g₂
pr122 (pr1 g₁,,
       pr12 g₁,,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁))
         (pr22 g₁)) • (pr1 β ▹ pr12 a₂) =
(pr12 a₁ ◃ id₂ (id₁ b))
• pr122 (pr1 g₂,,
         pr12 g₂,,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁))
           (pr22 g₂))

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         exact (pr2 β)).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ a : slice,
id₁ ((λ f : slice, f) a) ==>
(λ (a₁ a₂ : slice) (g : slice ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
 pr1 g,,
 pr12 g,,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁)) (pr22 g)) a a
  (id₁ a)

a: slice
pr122 (id₁ a) • (id₂ (pr1 (id₁ a)) ▹ pr12 a) =
(pr12 a ◃ id₂ (id₁ b))
• pr122 (pr1 (id₁ a),,
         pr12 (id₁ a),,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a))
           (pr22 (id₁ a)))

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite id2_rwhisker, id2_right ;
         rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (a b0 c : slice) (f : slice ⟦ a, b0 ⟧)
(g : slice ⟦ b0, c ⟧),
(λ (a₁ a₂ : slice) (g0 : slice ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
 pr1 g0,,
 pr12 g0,,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁)) (pr22 g0)) a
  b0 f
· (λ (a₁ a₂ : slice) (g0 : slice ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
   pr1 g0,,
   pr12 g0,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁)) (pr22 g0))
    b0 c g ==>
(λ (a₁ a₂ : slice) (g0 : slice ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
 pr1 g0,,
 pr12 g0,,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁)) (pr22 g0)) a c
  (f · g)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
a₁, a₂, a₃: slice
g₁: slice ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g₂: slice ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
pr122 ((pr1 g₁,,
        pr12 g₁,,
        comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁))
          (pr22 g₁))
       · (pr1 g₂,,
          pr12 g₂,,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₂))
            (pr22 g₂)))
• (id₂
     (pr1
        ((pr1 g₁,,
          pr12 g₁,,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁))
            (pr22 g₁))
         · (pr1 g₂,,
            pr12 g₂,,
            comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₂))
              (pr22 g₂)))) ▹ pr12 a₃) =
(pr12 a₁ ◃ id₂ (id₁ b))
• pr122 (pr1 (g₁ · g₂),,
         pr12 (g₁ · g₂),,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁))
           (pr22 (g₁ · g₂)))

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
         rewrite id2_rwhisker, id2_right ;
         rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp, <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         do 2 apply maponpaths_2 ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite <- lunitor_lwhisker ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
         rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
         rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite runitor_triangle ;
         rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

a, b0, c, d: slice
f: slice ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g: slice ⟦ b0, c ⟧
h: slice ⟦ c, d ⟧
((pr1 f ◃ id₂ (pr1 g · pr1 h))
 • id₂ (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h)))
• lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h) =
(lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)
 • (id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) ▹ pr1 h))
• id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h)

  Defined.

  (**
   3. From the fiber
   *)

D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
fiber → slice
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ a b0 : fiber,
fiber ⟦ a, b0 ⟧ → slice ⟦ ?F₀ a, ?F₀ b0 ⟧
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (a b0 : fiber) (f g : fiber ⟦ a, b0 ⟧),
f ==> g → ?F₁ a b0 f ==> ?F₁ a b0 g
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ a : fiber, id₁ (?F₀ a) ==> ?F₁ a a (id₁ a)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (a b0 c : fiber) (f : fiber ⟦ a, b0 ⟧)
(g : fiber ⟦ b0, c ⟧),
?F₁ a b0 f · ?F₁ b0 c g ==> ?F₁ a c (f · g)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
fiber → slice
 exact (λ f, f).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ a b : fiber,
fiber ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ slice ⟦ (λ f : fiber, f) a, (λ f : fiber, f) b ⟧
 exact (λ a₁ a₂ g,
             pr1 g
             ,,
             pr12 g
             ,,
             comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell _)
               (pr22 g)).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (a b0 : fiber) (f g : fiber ⟦ a, b0 ⟧),
f ==> g
→ (λ (a₁ a₂ : fiber) (g0 : fiber ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
   pr1 g0,,
   pr12 g0,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁)) (pr22 g0))
    a b0 f ==>
  (λ (a₁ a₂ : fiber) (g0 : fiber ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
   pr1 g0,,
   pr12 g0,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁)) (pr22 g0))
    a b0 g
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
a₁, a₂: fiber
g₁, g₂: fiber ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
β: g₁ ==> g₂
pr2
  (pr1 g₁,,
   pr12 g₁,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁)) (pr22 g₁)) ==>[
pr1 β] pr2
         (pr1 g₂,,
          pr12 g₂,,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁))
            (pr22 g₂))

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         refine (maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (pr2 β) @ _) ;
         rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ a : fiber,
id₁ ((λ f : fiber, f) a) ==>
(λ (a₁ a₂ : fiber) (g : fiber ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
 pr1 g,,
 pr12 g,,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁)) (pr22 g)) a
  a (id₁ a)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
a: fiber
pr2 (id₁ a) ==>[
id₂ (pr1 (id₁ a))] pr2
                     (pr1 (id₁ a),,
                      pr12 (id₁ a),,
                      comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell
                           (pr12 a)) (pr22 (id₁ a)))

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rinvunitor_runitor ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (a b0 c : fiber) (f : fiber ⟦ a, b0 ⟧)
(g : fiber ⟦ b0, c ⟧),
(λ (a₁ a₂ : fiber) (g0 : fiber ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
 pr1 g0,,
 pr12 g0,,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁)) (pr22 g0))
  a b0 f
· (λ (a₁ a₂ : fiber) (g0 : fiber ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
   pr1 g0,,
   pr12 g0,,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁)) (pr22 g0))
    b0 c g ==>
(λ (a₁ a₂ : fiber) (g0 : fiber ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧),
 pr1 g0,,
 pr12 g0,,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁)) (pr22 g0))
  a c (f · g)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
a₁, a₂, a₃: fiber
g₁: fiber ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g₂: fiber ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
pr2
  ((pr1 g₁,,
    pr12 g₁,,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁))
      (pr22 g₁))
   · (pr1 g₂,,
      pr12 g₂,,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₂))
        (pr22 g₂))) ==>[
id₂
  (pr1
     ((pr1 g₁,,
       pr12 g₁,,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₁))
         (pr22 g₁))
      · (pr1 g₂,,
         pr12 g₂,,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a₂))
           (pr22 g₂))))] pr2
                           (pr1 (g₁ · g₂),,
                            pr12 (g₁ · g₂),,
                            comp_of_invertible_2cell
                              (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell
                                 (pr12 a₁))
                              (pr22 (g₁ · g₂)))

      abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         apply maponpaths ;
         rewrite <- lwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         do 2 apply maponpaths_2 ;
         rewrite !lwhisker_hcomp ;
         rewrite triangle_r_inv ;
         rewrite <- rwhisker_hcomp, <- lwhisker_hcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
         rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite left_unit_inv_assoc ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         rewrite rinvunitor_natural ;
         rewrite <- rwhisker_hcomp ;
         apply maponpaths_2 ;
         refine (_ @ id2_right _) ;
         use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ;
         cbn ;
         use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ;
         cbn ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite <- runitor_triangle ;
         rewrite runitor_lunitor_identity ;
         rewrite lunitor_lwhisker ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  (((# from_fiber_disp_map_data f
     ◃ PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
         from_fiber_disp_map_data g h)

      (# from_fiber_disp_map_data g)
      (# from_fiber_disp_map_data h)
    • (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
a, b0, c, d: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g: fiber ⟦ b0, c ⟧
h: fiber ⟦ c, d ⟧
((pr1 f ◃ id₂ (pr1 g · pr1 h))
 • id₂ (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h)))
• pr1 (lassociator f g h) =
(pr1
   (lassociator
      (pr1 f,,
       pr12 f,,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a))
         (pr22 f))
      (pr1 g,,
       pr12 g,,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 b0))
         (pr22 g))
      (pr1 h,,
       pr12 h,,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 c))
         (pr22 h))) • (id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) ▹ pr1 h))
• id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
a, b0, c, d: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g: fiber ⟦ b0, c ⟧
h: fiber ⟦ c, d ⟧
((pr1 f ◃ id₂ (pr1 g · pr1 h))
 • id₂ (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h)))
• lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h) =
(pr1
   (lassociator
      (pr1 f,,
       pr12 f,,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a))
         (pr22 f))
      (pr1 g,,
       pr12 g,,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 b0))
         (pr22 g))
      (pr1 h,,
       pr12 h,,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 c))
         (pr22 h))) • (id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) ▹ pr1 h))
• id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
a, b0, c, d: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g: fiber ⟦ b0, c ⟧
h: fiber ⟦ c, d ⟧
((pr1 f ◃ id₂ (pr1 g · pr1 h))
 • id₂ (pr1 f · (pr1 g · pr1 h)))
• lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h) =
(lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)
 • (id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) ▹ pr1 h))
• id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g · pr1 h)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
a, b0, c, d: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g: fiber ⟦ b0, c ⟧
h: fiber ⟦ c, d ⟧
lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h) =
lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h)

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
a, b0, c: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g₁, g₂: fiber ⟦ b0, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
pr1
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
     from_fiber_disp_map_data f g₁
   • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
       from_fiber_disp_map_data (f ◃ η)) =
pr1
  ((# from_fiber_disp_map_data f
    ◃ PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
        from_fiber_disp_map_data η)
   • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
       from_fiber_disp_map_data f g₂)

slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
a, b0, c: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g₁, g₂: fiber ⟦ b0, c ⟧
η: g₁ ==> g₂
id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g₁) • pr1 (f ◃ η) =
pr1
  ((pr1 f,,
    pr12 f,,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 a)) (pr22 f))
   ◃ (pr1 η,,
      from_fiber_disp_map_data_subproof b0 c g₁ g₂ η))
• id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g₂)

   ◃ (pr1 η,,

  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
     from_fiber_disp_map_data f₁ g
   • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
       from_fiber_disp_map_data (η ▹ g)) =

      from_fiber_disp_map_data η
    ▹ # from_fiber_disp_map_data g)
   • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
a, b0, c: fiber
f₁, f₂: fiber ⟦ a, b0 ⟧
g: fiber ⟦ b0, c ⟧
η: f₁ ==> f₂
id₂ (pr1 f₁ · pr1 g) • pr1 (η ▹ g) =
pr1
  ((pr1 η,,
    from_fiber_disp_map_data_subproof a b0 f₁ f₂ η)
   ▹ (pr1 g,,
      pr12 g,,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 b0))
        (pr22 g))) • id₂ (pr1 f₂ · pr1 g)

   ▹ (pr1 g,,
      pr12 g,,

        (pr22 g))) • id₂ (pr1 f₂ · pr1 g)

      apply idpath.

        is_iso.
  Defined.

  (**
   4. The unit
   *)
  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
pstrans_data (id_psfunctor slice)
  (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
     to_fiber_disp_map)

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat

  (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
     to_fiber_disp_map)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ X : slice,
slice ⟦ id_psfunctor slice X,
comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map to_fiber_disp_map X
⟧
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (X Y : slice) (f : slice ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  (?η₁ X
   · # (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
          to_fiber_disp_map) f)
  (# (id_psfunctor slice) f · ?η₁ Y)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ X : slice,
slice ⟦ id_psfunctor slice X,
comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map to_fiber_disp_map X
⟧
 exact (λ f, id₁ _ ,, id_pred_mor D _ ,, linvunitor_invertible_2cell _).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (X Y : slice) (f : slice ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  ((λ f0 : slice,
    id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor slice f0)),,
    id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor slice f0)),,
    linvunitor_invertible_2cell
      (pr12 (id_psfunctor slice f0))) X
   · # (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
          to_fiber_disp_map) f)
  (# (id_psfunctor slice) f
   · (λ f0 : slice,
      id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor slice f0)),,
      id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor slice f0)),,
      linvunitor_invertible_2cell
        (pr12 (id_psfunctor slice f0))) Y)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (X Y : ∑ (x : B) (f : B ⟦ x, b ⟧), pred_ob D f)
(f : ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧,
     pred_mor D (pr12 X) (pr12 Y) f
     × invertible_2cell (pr12 X) (f · pr12 Y)),
invertible_2cell
  (id₁ (pr1 X) · pr1 f,,
   comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 X)) (pr12 f),,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 X))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 X))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 X))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 X))
                 (pr22 f))))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 X))
           (pr1 f) (pr12 Y))))
  (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 Y),,
   comp_pred_mor D (pr12 f) (id_pred_mor D (pr12 Y)),,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 f)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 Y)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)) (pr12 Y))))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
f₁, f₂: ∑ (x : B) (f : B ⟦ x, b ⟧), pred_ob D f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
pred_mor D (pr12 f₁) (pr12 f₂) f
× invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁) (f · pr12 f₂)
invertible_2cell
  (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
   comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₁)) (pr12 g),,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
                 (pr22 g))))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
           (pr1 g) (pr12 f₂))))
  (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
   comp_pred_mor D (pr12 g) (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₂)),,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 g)
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₂)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
           (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr12 f₂))))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
f₁, f₂: ∑ (x : B) (f : B ⟦ x, b ⟧), pred_ob D f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
pred_mor D (pr12 f₁) (pr12 f₂) f
× invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁) (f · pr12 f₂)
(id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
 comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₁)) (pr12 g),,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
               (pr22 g))))
      (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
         (pr1 g) (pr12 f₂)))) ==>
(pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
 comp_pred_mor D (pr12 g) (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₂)),,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 g)
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₂)))
      (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
         (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr12 f₂))))
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
f₁, f₂: ∑ (x : B) (f : B ⟦ x, b ⟧), pred_ob D f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
pred_mor D (pr12 f₁) (pr12 f₂) f
× invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁) (f · pr12 f₂)
is_invertible_2cell ?η

                     (pr12 f₂)))

                  (pr1 g)

                  (pr12 f₂)))),
 pr2
   (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
    comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₁)) (pr12 g),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))

 η] pr2

  ?pr1

f₁, f₂: ∑ (x : B) (f : B ⟦ x, b ⟧), pred_ob D f
g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
pred_mor D (pr12 f₁) (pr12 f₂) f
× invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁) (f · pr12 f₂)
(λ η : pr1
         (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
          comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₁))
            (pr12 g),,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                  (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr12 f₁))
                     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                        (runitor_invertible_2cell
                           (pr12 f₁)) (pr22 g))))
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                  (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (pr1 g) (pr12 f₂)))) ==>
       pr1
         (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
          comp_pred_mor D (pr12 g)
            (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₂)),,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 g)
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr12 f₂)))
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
                  (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr12 f₂)))),
 pr2
   (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
    comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₁)) (pr12 g),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
                  (pr22 g))))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
            (pr1 g) (pr12 f₂)))) ==>[
 η] pr2
      (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
       comp_pred_mor D (pr12 g)
         (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₂)),,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 g)
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₂)))
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
               (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr12 f₂)))))
  (lunitor (pr1 g) • rinvunitor (pr1 g)
   :
   pr1
     (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
      comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₁))
        (pr12 g),,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
              (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                 (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell
                    (pr12 f₁))
                 (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                    (runitor_invertible_2cell
                       (pr12 f₁)) (pr22 g))))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell
              (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (pr1 g) (pr12 f₂)))) ==>
   pr1
     (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
      comp_pred_mor D (pr12 g)
        (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₂)),,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 g)
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₂)))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
              (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr12 f₂)))))
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite rinvunitor_runitor ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite lwhisker_hcomp ;
             rewrite <- linvunitor_natural ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite linvunitor_assoc ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite <- rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
             rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite runitor_rwhisker ;
             rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
             apply idpath).

g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
pred_mor D (pr12 f₁) (pr12 f₂) f
× invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁) (f · pr12 f₂)
is_invertible_2cell
  ((lunitor (pr1 g) • rinvunitor (pr1 g)
    :
    pr1
      (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
       comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₁))
         (pr12 g),,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
               (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr12 f₁))
                  (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                     (runitor_invertible_2cell
                        (pr12 f₁)) (pr22 g))))
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell
               (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (pr1 g) (pr12 f₂)))) ==>
    pr1
      (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
       comp_pred_mor D (pr12 g)
         (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₂)),,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 g)
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₂)))
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
               (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr12 f₂))))),,
   to_fiber_disp_map_unit_data_subproof f₁ f₂ g
   :
   (id₁ (pr1 f₁) · pr1 g,,
    comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₁)) (pr12 g),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁))
                  (pr22 g))))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁))
            (pr1 g) (pr12 f₂)))) ==>
   (pr1 g · id₁ (pr1 f₂),,
    comp_pred_mor D (pr12 g) (id_pred_mor D (pr12 f₂)),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell (pr22 g)
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f₂)))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 g)
            (id₁ (pr1 f₂)) (pr12 f₂)))))

g: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
pred_mor D (pr12 f₁) (pr12 f₂) f
× invertible_2cell (pr12 f₁) (f · pr12 f₂)
is_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor (pr1 g) • rinvunitor (pr1 g))

        is_iso.
  Defined.

b: B

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (X Y : slice) (f g : slice ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_data X
 ◃ ##
     (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
        to_fiber_disp_map) α)
• pr2 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_data X Y g =
pr2 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_data X Y f
• (## (id_psfunctor slice) α
   ▹ pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_data Y)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ X : slice,
(pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_id
     (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
        to_fiber_disp_map) X)
• pr2 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_data X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_data X)
 • linvunitor (pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_data X))

g: slice ⟦ y, z ⟧
lunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g) =
(lassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (pr1 g)
 • (((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)) ▹ pr1 g)
    • (rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 g)
       • ((pr1 f
           ◃ (lunitor (pr1 g) • rinvunitor (pr1 g)))
          • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (id₁ (pr1 z))))))
• runitor (pr1 f · pr1 g)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y, z: slice
f: slice ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: slice ⟦ y, z ⟧
lunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g) =
(lassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (pr1 g)
 • (((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)) ▹ pr1 g)
    • (rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 g)
       • ((pr1 f
           ◃ (lunitor (pr1 g) • rinvunitor (pr1 g)))
          • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (id₁ (pr1 z))))))
• (rassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (id₁ (pr1 z))
   • (pr1 f ◃ runitor (pr1 g)))

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (X Y : slice) (f : slice ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (?η₁ X · # (id_psfunctor slice) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
        to_fiber_disp_map) f · 
   ?η₁ Y)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ X : slice,
slice
⟦ comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map to_fiber_disp_map
    X, id_psfunctor slice X ⟧
 exact (λ x, id₁ _ ,, id_pred_mor D _ ,, linvunitor_invertible_2cell _).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (X Y : slice) (f : slice ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  ((λ x : slice,
    id₁
      (pr1
         (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
            to_fiber_disp_map x)),,
    id_pred_mor D
      (pr12 (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
               to_fiber_disp_map x)),,
    linvunitor_invertible_2cell
      (pr12 (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
               to_fiber_disp_map x))) X
   · # (id_psfunctor slice) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
        to_fiber_disp_map) f
   · (λ x : slice,
      id₁
        (pr1
           (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
              to_fiber_disp_map x)),,
      id_pred_mor D
        (pr12 (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
                 to_fiber_disp_map x)),,
      linvunitor_invertible_2cell
        (pr12 (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
                 to_fiber_disp_map x))) Y)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (X Y : ∑ (x : B) (f : B ⟦ x, b ⟧), pred_ob D f)
(f : ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧,
     pred_mor D (pr12 X) (pr12 Y) f
     × invertible_2cell (pr12 X) (f · pr12 Y)),
invertible_2cell
  (id₁ (pr1 X) · pr1 f,,
   comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 X)) (pr12 f),,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 X))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 X))
           (pr22 f))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 X))
           (pr1 f) (pr12 Y))))
  (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 Y),,
   comp_pred_mor D (pr12 f) (id_pred_mor D (pr12 Y)),,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 X))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 X))
           (pr22 f)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 Y)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
           (id₁ (pr1 Y)) (pr12 Y))))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: ∑ (x : B) (f : B ⟦ x, b ⟧), pred_ob D f
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 y ⟧,
pred_mor D (pr12 x) (pr12 y) f
× invertible_2cell (pr12 x) (f · pr12 y)
invertible_2cell
  (id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f,,
   comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 x)) (pr12 f),,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 x))
           (pr22 f))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 x))
           (pr1 f) (pr12 y))))
  (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y),,
   comp_pred_mor D (pr12 f) (id_pred_mor D (pr12 y)),,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
           (pr22 f)))
     (comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y)))
        (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
           (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr12 y))))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: ∑ (x : B) (f : B ⟦ x, b ⟧), pred_ob D f
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 y ⟧,
pred_mor D (pr12 x) (pr12 y) f
× invertible_2cell (pr12 x) (f · pr12 y)
(id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f,,
 comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 x)) (pr12 f),,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 x))
         (pr22 f))
      (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 x))
         (pr1 f) (pr12 y)))) ==>
(pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y),,
 comp_pred_mor D (pr12 f) (id_pred_mor D (pr12 y)),,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x)) (pr22 f)))
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y)))
      (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
         (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr12 y))))
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: ∑ (x : B) (f : B ⟦ x, b ⟧), pred_ob D f
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 y ⟧,
pred_mor D (pr12 x) (pr12 y) f
× invertible_2cell (pr12 x) (f · pr12 y)
is_invertible_2cell ?η

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: ∑ (x : B) (f : B ⟦ x, b ⟧), pred_ob D f
f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 y ⟧,
pred_mor D (pr12 x) (pr12 y) f
× invertible_2cell (pr12 x) (f · pr12 y)
(id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f,,
 comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 x)) (pr12 f),,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 x))
         (pr22 f))
      (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 x))
         (pr1 f) (pr12 y)))) ==>
(pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y),,
 comp_pred_mor D (pr12 f) (id_pred_mor D (pr12 y)),,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x)) (pr22 f)))
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y)))
      (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
         (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr12 y))))

                  (pr22 f)))

                  (pr1 f)

                     (pr12 y)))
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell 
                  (pr1 f) 
                  (id₁ (pr1 y)) 
                  (pr12 y)))),
 pr2
   (id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f,,
    comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 x)) (pr12 f),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))

            (pr1 f) (pr12 y)))) ==>[
 η] pr2

       comp_pred_mor D (pr12 f)
         (id_pred_mor D (pr12 y)),,

               (pr12 y))))) 
  ?pr1

× invertible_2cell (pr12 x) (f · pr12 y)
(λ η : pr1
         (id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f,,
          comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 x))
            (pr12 f),,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell
                  (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr22 f))
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell
                  (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (pr12 y)))) ==>

         (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y),,
          comp_pred_mor D (pr12 f)
            (id_pred_mor D (pr12 y)),,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
               (comp_of_invertible_2cell
                  (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
                  (pr22 f)))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
                  (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                     (pr12 y)))
               (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
                  (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr12 y)))),
 pr2
   (id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f,,
    comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 x)) (pr12 f),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 x))
            (pr22 f))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 x))
            (pr1 f) (pr12 y)))) ==>[
 η] pr2
      (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y),,
       comp_pred_mor D (pr12 f)
         (id_pred_mor D (pr12 y)),,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
            (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
               (pr22 f)))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y)))
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
               (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr12 y)))))
  (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)
   :
   pr1
     (id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f,,
      comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 x))
        (pr12 f),,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 x))
              (pr22 f))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 x))
              (pr1 f) (pr12 y)))) ==>
   pr1
     (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y),,
      comp_pred_mor D (pr12 f)
        (id_pred_mor D (pr12 y)),,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
           (comp_of_invertible_2cell
              (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
              (pr22 f)))
        (comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
              (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y)))
           (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
              (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr12 y)))))
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite rinvunitor_runitor ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite lwhisker_hcomp ;
             rewrite <- linvunitor_natural ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite linvunitor_assoc ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite <- rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
             rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite runitor_rwhisker ;
             rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
             apply idpath).

f: ∑ f : B ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 y ⟧,
pred_mor D (pr12 x) (pr12 y) f
× invertible_2cell (pr12 x) (f · pr12 y)
is_invertible_2cell
  ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)
    :
    pr1
      (id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f,,
       comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 x))
         (pr12 f),,

               (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr22 f))

         (comp_of_invertible_2cell

               (pr22 f)))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell

               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y)))
            (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
               (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr12 y))))),,
   to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data_subproof x y f
   :
   (id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f,,
    comp_pred_mor D (id_pred_mor D (pr12 x)) (pr12 f),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))

            (pr22 f))

            (pr1 f) (pr12 y)))) ==>
   (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y),,
    comp_pred_mor D (pr12 f) (id_pred_mor D (pr12 y)),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (rinvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
         (comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
            (pr22 f)))
      (comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (lwhisker_of_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y)))
         (lassociator_invertible_2cell (pr1 f)
            (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr12 y)))))

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (X Y : slice) (f g : slice ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X
 ◃ ## (id_psfunctor slice) α)
• pr2 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X Y g =
pr2 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X Y f
• (##
     (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
        to_fiber_disp_map) α
   ▹ pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data Y)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ X : slice,
(pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_id (id_psfunctor slice) X)
• pr2 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X X (id₁ X) =
(runitor (pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X)
 • linvunitor (pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X))
• (psfunctor_id
     (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
        to_fiber_disp_map) X
   ▹ pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X)
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (X Y Z : slice) (f : slice ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(g : slice ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor slice) f g)
• pr2 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator
      (pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X)
      (# (id_psfunctor slice) f)
      (# (id_psfunctor slice) g)
    • (pr2 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X Y f
       ▹ # (id_psfunctor slice) g))
   • rassociator
       (# (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
             to_fiber_disp_map) f)
       (pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data Y)
       (# (id_psfunctor slice) g))
  • (# (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
          to_fiber_disp_map) f
     ◃ pr2 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data Y Z g))
 • lassociator
     (# (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
           to_fiber_disp_map) f)
     (# (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
           to_fiber_disp_map) g)
     (pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data Z))
• (psfunctor_comp
     (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
        to_fiber_disp_map) f g
   ▹ pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data Z)

    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (X Y : slice) (f g : slice ⟦ X, Y ⟧) (α : f ==> g),
(pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X
 ◃ ## (id_psfunctor slice) α)
• pr2 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv_data X Y g =

         • (lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (id₁ (pr1 z))
            • runitor (pr1 f · pr1 g)))))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y, z: slice
f: slice ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: slice ⟦ y, z ⟧
lunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g) • id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) =
lunitor (pr1 f · pr1 g)
• ((rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g)
   • (rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 g)
      • ((pr1 f
          ◃ (lunitor (pr1 g) • rinvunitor (pr1 g)))
         • (lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (id₁ (pr1 z))
            • runitor (pr1 f · pr1 g)))))

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y, z: slice
f: slice ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: slice ⟦ y, z ⟧
id₂ (pr1 f · pr1 g) =
(rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g)
• (rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (pr1 g)
   • ((pr1 f ◃ (lunitor (pr1 g) • rinvunitor (pr1 g)))
      • (lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (id₁ (pr1 z))
         • runitor (pr1 f · pr1 g))))

runitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g = runitor (pr1 f) ▹ pr1 g

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (**
   5. The counit

∏ X : fiber,
fiber
⟦ comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map from_fiber_disp_map
    X, id_psfunctor fiber X ⟧
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (X Y : fiber) (f : fiber ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell (?η₁ X · # (id_psfunctor fiber) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
        from_fiber_disp_map) f · 
   ?η₁ Y)

disp_map_bicat_mor D X X (id₁ b)

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
f: disp_map_bicat_ob D b
invertible_2cell (pr12 f · id₁ b)
  (id₁ (pr1 f) · pr12 f)

      exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell _)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell _)).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (X Y : fiber) (f : fiber ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  (((λ f0 : disp_map_bicat_ob D b,
     id₁ (pr1 f0),,
     id_pred_mor D (pr12 f0),,
     comp_of_invertible_2cell
       (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f0))
       (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f0)))
    :
    ∏ X0 : fiber,
    fiber
    ⟦ comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
        from_fiber_disp_map X0, id_psfunctor fiber X0
    ⟧) X · # (id_psfunctor fiber) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
        from_fiber_disp_map) f
   · ((λ f0 : disp_map_bicat_ob D b,
       id₁ (pr1 f0),,
       id_pred_mor D (pr12 f0),,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f0))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 f0)))
      :
      ∏ X0 : fiber,
      fiber
      ⟦ comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
          from_fiber_disp_map X0,
      id_psfunctor fiber X0 ⟧) Y)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
invertible_2cell
  ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
    id_pred_mor D (pr12 x),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x)))
   · # (id_psfunctor fiber) f)
  (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
        from_fiber_disp_map) f
   · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
      id_pred_mor D (pr12 y),,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y))))

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
(id₁ (pr1 x),,
 id_pred_mor D (pr12 x),,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x)))
· # (id_psfunctor fiber) f ==>
# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
     from_fiber_disp_map) f
· (id₁ (pr1 y),,
   id_pred_mor D (pr12 y),,
   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y))
     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y)))

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell ?η

(id₁ (pr1 x),,
 id_pred_mor D (pr12 x),,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x)))
· # (id_psfunctor fiber) f ==>

     from_fiber_disp_map) f
· (id₁ (pr1 y),,

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
    id_pred_mor D (pr12 x),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x)))
   · # (id_psfunctor fiber) f) ==>
pr1
  (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
        from_fiber_disp_map) f
   · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
      id_pred_mor D (pr12 y),,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y))))
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
(λ α : pr1
         ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
           id_pred_mor D (pr12 x),,
           comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x)))
          · # (id_psfunctor fiber) f) ==>
       pr1
         (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
               from_fiber_disp_map) f
          · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
             id_pred_mor D (pr12 y),,
             comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y))
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y)))),
 pr122 ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
         id_pred_mor D (pr12 x),,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x)))
        · # (id_psfunctor fiber) f)
 • (α ▹ pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber y)) =
 (pr12 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
          from_fiber_disp_map x) ◃ 
  id₂ (id₁ b))
 • pr122 (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
               from_fiber_disp_map) f
          · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
             id_pred_mor D (pr12 y),,
             comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y))
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y)))))
  ?pr1

x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
    id_pred_mor D (pr12 x),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x)))
   · # (id_psfunctor fiber) f) ==>
pr1
  (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
        from_fiber_disp_map) f
   · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
      id_pred_mor D (pr12 y),,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y))))
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat

 • pr122 (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
               from_fiber_disp_map) f
          · (id₁ (pr1 y),,
             id_pred_mor D (pr12 y),,
             comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y))
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 y)))))
  (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)
   :
   pr1
     ((id₁ (pr1 x),,
       id_pred_mor D (pr12 x),,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (runitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell (pr12 x)))
      · # (id_psfunctor fiber) f) ==>
   pr1
     (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map

      · (id₁ (pr1 y),,

 abstract
            (cbn ;
             rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
             rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             do 3 apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             refine (!_) ;
             etrans ;
             [ do 4 apply maponpaths ;
               rewrite lwhisker_hcomp ;
               apply triangle_l_inv
             | ] ;
             rewrite <- rwhisker_hcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite lunitor_triangle ;
             rewrite runitor_triangle ;
             rewrite vcomp_lunitor ;
             rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite <- lunitor_triangle ;
             rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
             use vcomp_move_R_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
             rewrite id2_right ;
             rewrite <- runitor_triangle ;
             rewrite runitor_lunitor_identity ;
             apply lunitor_lwhisker).

  Qed.

  Transparent comp_psfunctor.

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
     from_fiber_disp_map) (id_psfunctor fiber)

slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
pstrans
  (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
     from_fiber_disp_map) (id_psfunctor fiber)

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x: fiber
invertible_2cell (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x) · id₁ b)
  (id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x))
   · pr12 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
             from_fiber_disp_map x))

      exact (comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell _)
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell _)).
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
∏ (X Y : fiber) (f : fiber ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
invertible_2cell
  ((λ x : fiber,
    id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
    id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (runitor_invertible_2cell
         (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
         (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) X
   · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
          from_fiber_disp_map) f)
  (# (id_psfunctor fiber) f
   · (λ x : fiber,
      id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
      id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell
        (runitor_invertible_2cell
           (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
        (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
           (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) Y)

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
(λ x : fiber,
 id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
 id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
 comp_of_invertible_2cell
   (runitor_invertible_2cell
      (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
   (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
      (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) x
· # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
       from_fiber_disp_map) f ==>
# (id_psfunctor fiber) f
· (λ x : fiber,
   id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,

   comp_of_invertible_2cell
     (runitor_invertible_2cell

     (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
        (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) y

D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
pr1
  ((λ x : fiber,
    id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
    id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
    comp_of_invertible_2cell
      (runitor_invertible_2cell
         (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
      (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
         (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) x
   · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
          from_fiber_disp_map) f) ==>
pr1
  (# (id_psfunctor fiber) f
   · (λ x : fiber,
      id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
      id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
      comp_of_invertible_2cell

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
(λ α : pr1
         ((λ x : fiber,
           id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
           id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
           comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (runitor_invertible_2cell
                (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) x
          · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
                 from_fiber_disp_map) f) ==>
       pr1
         (# (id_psfunctor fiber) f
          · (λ x : fiber,
             id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
             id_pred_mor D
               (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
             comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) y),
 pr122 ((λ x : fiber,
         id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
         id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (runitor_invertible_2cell
              (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) x
        · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
               from_fiber_disp_map) f)
 • (α
    ▹ pr12 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
              from_fiber_disp_map y)) =
 (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x) ◃ id₂ (id₁ b))
 • pr122 (# (id_psfunctor fiber) f
          · (λ x : fiber,
             id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
             id_pred_mor D
               (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
             comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) y))
  ?pr1

D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
id₁ (pr1 x) · pr1 f ==> pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y)

          exact (lunitor _ • rinvunitor _).
        
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
(λ α : pr1
         ((λ x : fiber,
           id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
           id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
           comp_of_invertible_2cell
             (runitor_invertible_2cell
                (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
             (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) x
          · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
                 from_fiber_disp_map) f) ==>
       pr1
         (# (id_psfunctor fiber) f
          · (λ x : fiber,
             id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
             id_pred_mor D
               (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
             comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) y),
 pr122 ((λ x : fiber,
         id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
         id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (runitor_invertible_2cell
              (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) x
        · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
               from_fiber_disp_map) f)
 • (α
    ▹ pr12 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
              from_fiber_disp_map y)) =
 (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x) ◃ id₂ (id₁ b))
 • pr122 (# (id_psfunctor fiber) f
          · (λ x : fiber,
             id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
             id_pred_mor D
               (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
             comp_of_invertible_2cell
               (runitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
               (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
                  (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) y))
  (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)
   :
   pr1
     ((λ x : fiber,
       id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
       id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
       comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (runitor_invertible_2cell
            (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
         (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
            (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) x
      · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
             from_fiber_disp_map) f) ==>
   pr1
     (# (id_psfunctor fiber) f
      · (λ x : fiber,
         id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
         id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
         comp_of_invertible_2cell
           (runitor_invertible_2cell
              (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
           (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
              (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) y))
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
             rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             do 2 apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite runitor_rinvunitor ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite runitor_rwhisker ;
             rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite id2_right ;
             rewrite runitor_triangle ;
             rewrite lunitor_triangle ;
             rewrite vcomp_lunitor ;
             rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite <- lunitor_triangle ;
             rewrite (maponpaths (λ z, _ • (_ • z)) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
             rewrite id2_rwhisker ;
             rewrite id2_right ;
             rewrite <- runitor_triangle ;
             rewrite runitor_lunitor_identity ;
             rewrite lunitor_lwhisker ;
             apply idpath).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)
    :
    pr1
      ((λ x : fiber,
        id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
        id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
        comp_of_invertible_2cell
          (runitor_invertible_2cell
             (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
          (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
             (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) x
       · # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
              from_fiber_disp_map) f) ==>
    pr1
      (# (id_psfunctor fiber) f
       · (λ x : fiber,
          id₁ (pr1 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
          id_pred_mor D (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)),,
          comp_of_invertible_2cell
            (runitor_invertible_2cell
               (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))
            (linvunitor_invertible_2cell
               (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)))) y)),,
   to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv_data_subproof x y f)
 
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b))
  ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)),,
   to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv_data_subproof x y f)

D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat

is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1
     ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)),,
      to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv_data_subproof x y f))

is_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))

        is_iso.
  Defined.

  Opaque strict_fiber_bicat comp_psfunctor.

slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f, g: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
pr1 α ▹ id₁ (pr1 y) =
id₂
  (id₁
     (pr1
        (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
           from_fiber_disp_map y)))
⋆⋆ pr1
     (##
        (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
           from_fiber_disp_map) α)

      apply rwhisker_hcomp.

     (pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv_data X))

   ▹ pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv_data X)

∏ (X Y Z : fiber) (f : fiber ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
(g : fiber ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
(pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv_data X
 ◃ psfunctor_comp
     (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
        from_fiber_disp_map) f g)
• pr2 to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv_data X Z (f · g) =
((((lassociator
      (pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv_data X)
      (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
            from_fiber_disp_map) f)
      (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
            from_fiber_disp_map) g)
    • (pr2 to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv_data X Y f
       ▹ # (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
              from_fiber_disp_map) g))
   • rassociator (# (id_psfunctor fiber) f)
       (pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv_data Y)
       (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
             from_fiber_disp_map) g))
  • (# (id_psfunctor fiber) f
     ◃ pr2 to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv_data Y Z g))
 • lassociator (# (id_psfunctor fiber) f)
     (# (id_psfunctor fiber) g)
     (pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv_data Z))
• (psfunctor_comp (id_psfunctor fiber) f g
   ▹ pr1 to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv_data Z)

DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y, z: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: fiber ⟦ y, z ⟧
pr1 (id₂ (f · g)) ▹ id₁ (pr1 z) = ?t2

        apply id2_rwhisker.
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B

fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y, z: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: fiber ⟦ y, z ⟧
((((lassociator (id₁ (pr1 x))
      (pr1
         (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
               from_fiber_disp_map) f))
      (pr1
         (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
               from_fiber_disp_map) g))
    • ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))
       ▹ pr1
           (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
                 from_fiber_disp_map) g)))
   • rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y))
       (pr1
          (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
                from_fiber_disp_map) g)))
  • (pr1 f ◃ (lunitor (pr1 g) • rinvunitor (pr1 g))))
 • lassociator (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (id₁ (pr1 z)))
• id₂ (pr1 (f · g) · id₁ (pr1 z)) =
lunitor (pr1 (f · g)) • rinvunitor (pr1 (f · g))

f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: fiber ⟦ y, z ⟧
?b = ?t2

  Transparent strict_fiber_bicat comp_psfunctor.

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
pstrans (id_psfunctor fiber)
  (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
     from_fiber_disp_map)
