  Defined.

  (**
   6. The modifications
   *)
  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
invertible_modification_data
  (id_pstrans
     (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
        to_fiber_disp_map))
  (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv
     to_fiber_disp_map_unit)

  
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B

     (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
        to_fiber_disp_map))
  (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv
     to_fiber_disp_map_unit)

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x: slice
invertible_2cell
  (id_pstrans
     (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
        to_fiber_disp_map) x)
  (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv
     to_fiber_disp_map_unit x)

comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv
  to_fiber_disp_map_unit x

D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x: slice
pr1
  (id_pstrans
     (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
        to_fiber_disp_map) x) ==>
pr1
  (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv
     to_fiber_disp_map_unit x)

(λ η : pr1
         (id_pstrans

               to_fiber_disp_map) x) ==>
       pr1
         (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv
            to_fiber_disp_map_unit x),
 pr2
   (id_pstrans

 η] pr2

  ?pr1

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x: slice
(λ η : pr1
         (id_pstrans
            (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
               to_fiber_disp_map) x) ==>
       pr1
         (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv
            to_fiber_disp_map_unit x),
 pr2
   (id_pstrans
      (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
         to_fiber_disp_map) x) ==>[
 η] pr2
      (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv
         to_fiber_disp_map_unit x))
  (linvunitor
     (pr1
        (id_pstrans
           (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
              to_fiber_disp_map) x)))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
           use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
           rewrite lunitor_runitor_identity ;
           rewrite lwhisker_hcomp, rwhisker_hcomp ;
           apply triangle_r).

is_invertible_2cell
  (linvunitor
     (pr1
        (id_pstrans
           (comp_psfunctor from_fiber_disp_map
              to_fiber_disp_map) x)),,
   disp_map_unit_inv_left_data_subproof x)

psnaturality_of
  (id_pstrans

x, y: slice
f: slice ⟦ x, y ⟧
(lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))
• (pr1 f ◃ linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 y))) =
(linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 x)) ▹ pr1 f)
• ((((rassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
      • (id₁ (pr1 x)
         ◃ (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))))
     • lassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)))
    • ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))
       ▹ id₁ (pr1 y)))
   • rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)))

(((((linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 x)) ▹ pr1 f)
    • rassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f))
   • (id₁ (pr1 x)
      ◃ (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))))

 • ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))
    ▹ id₁ (pr1 y)))

   • (lunitor (id₁ (pr1 x)) ▹ pr1 f))
  • (id₁ (pr1 x) ◃ rinvunitor (pr1 f)))
 • lassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)))
• (lunitor (pr1 f) ▹ id₁ (pr1 y)) =
lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: slice
f: slice ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((linvunitor (id₁ (pr1 x)) • lunitor (id₁ (pr1 x)))
   ▹ pr1 f) • (id₁ (pr1 x) ◃ rinvunitor (pr1 f)))
 • lassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)))
• (lunitor (pr1 f) ▹ id₁ (pr1 y)) =
lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)

(λ η : pr1
         (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_unit
            to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv x) ==>
       pr1 (id_pstrans (id_psfunctor slice) x),
 pr2
   (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_unit

 exact (lunitor _).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x: slice
(λ η : pr1
         (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_unit
            to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv x) ==>
       pr1 (id_pstrans (id_psfunctor slice) x),
 pr2
   (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_unit
      to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv x) ==>[
 η] pr2 (id_pstrans (id_psfunctor slice) x))
  (lunitor
     (pr1 ((pr111 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv) x)))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           refine (_ @ id2_right _) ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           use vcomp_move_R_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
           rewrite id2_right ;
           rewrite lunitor_runitor_identity ;
           rewrite lwhisker_hcomp, rwhisker_hcomp ;
           refine (!_) ;
           apply triangle_r).

x: slice
is_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor
     (pr1 ((pr111 to_fiber_disp_map_unit_inv) x)),,
   disp_map_unit_inv_right_data_subproof x)

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: slice
f: slice ⟦ x, y ⟧
((((rassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
    • (id₁ (pr1 x)
       ◃ (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))))
   • lassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)))
  • ((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))
     ▹ id₁ (pr1 y)))
 • rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)))
• (pr1 f ◃ lunitor (id₁ (pr1 y))) =

rassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
• ((id₁ (pr1 x)
    ◃ (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f)))
   • (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y))
      • (((lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))
          ▹ id₁ (pr1 y))
         • (rassociator (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y))

   • (lassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f) (id₁ (pr1 y))
      • (lunitor (pr1 f) ▹ id₁ (pr1 y)))) =
(lunitor (id₁ (pr1 x)) ▹ pr1 f)
• (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: slice
f: slice ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (pr1 f)
• (((id₁ (pr1 x) ◃ lunitor (pr1 f))
    • (id₁ (pr1 x) ◃ rinvunitor (pr1 f)))
   • lunitor (pr1 f · id₁ (pr1 y))) =
(lunitor (id₁ (pr1 x)) ▹ pr1 f)
• (lunitor (pr1 f) • rinvunitor (pr1 f))

(λ α : pr1
         (id_pstrans

               from_fiber_disp_map) x) ==>
       pr1

 pr122 (id_pstrans

    ▹ pr12 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x: fiber
(λ α : pr1
         (id_pstrans
            (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
               from_fiber_disp_map) x) ==>
       pr1
         (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_counit
            to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv x),
 pr122 (id_pstrans
          (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
             from_fiber_disp_map) x)
 • (α
    ▹ pr12 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
              from_fiber_disp_map x)) =
 (pr12 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
          from_fiber_disp_map x) ◃ id₂ (id₁ b))
 • pr122 (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_counit
            to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv x))
  (linvunitor
     (pr1
        (id_pstrans
           (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
              from_fiber_disp_map) x)))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite lunitor_runitor_identity ;
           rewrite runitor_rwhisker ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
           rewrite id2_right ;
           rewrite <- rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite <- lunitor_lwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite runitor_triangle ;
           rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
           apply idpath).

              from_fiber_disp_map) x)),,
   disp_map_counit_inv_right_data_subproof x)

 • (rinvunitor (pr1 f) ▹ id₁ (pr1 y)))
• rassociator
    (pr1
       ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
                  from_fiber_disp_map)) x y f))

          ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map

           from_fiber_disp_map) f)
   ◃ linvunitor
       (pr1
          (id₁
             ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
                        from_fiber_disp_map)) y))))

D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B

x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator
  (pr1
     ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
                from_fiber_disp_map)) x y f))
  (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) =
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (id₁ (pr1 y))
   (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (pr1 f))) ^-1
• (pr1
     (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
           from_fiber_disp_map) f)
   ◃ linvunitor

x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
rassociator
  (pr1
     ((pr211 (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
                from_fiber_disp_map)) x y f))
  (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
     (pr1
        (# (comp_psfunctor to_fiber_disp_map
              from_fiber_disp_map) f))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
        (pr1
           (id₁
              ((pr111 (comp_psfunctor
                         to_fiber_disp_map
                         from_fiber_disp_map)) y)))))
  ^-1 =
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (id₁ (pr1 y))
   (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (pr1 f))) ^-1

    apply lunitor_lwhisker.
  Qed.

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x: fiber
(λ α : pr1
         (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv
            to_fiber_disp_map_counit x) ==>
       pr1 (id_pstrans (id_psfunctor fiber) x),
 pr122 (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv
          to_fiber_disp_map_counit x)
 • (α ▹ pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)) =
 (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x) ◃ id₂ (id₁ b))
 • pr122 (id_pstrans (id_psfunctor fiber) x)) 
  ?pr1

      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B

  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat

  (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv
     to_fiber_disp_map_counit x) ==>
pr1 (id_pstrans (id_psfunctor fiber) x)
 exact (lunitor _).
      
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x: fiber
(λ α : pr1
         (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv
            to_fiber_disp_map_counit x) ==>
       pr1 (id_pstrans (id_psfunctor fiber) x),
 pr122 (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv
          to_fiber_disp_map_counit x)
 • (α ▹ pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x)) =
 (pr12 (id_psfunctor fiber x) ◃ id₂ (id₁ b))
 • pr122 (id_pstrans (id_psfunctor fiber) x))
  (lunitor (pr1 ((pr111 to_fiber_disp_map_counit) x)))
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2, id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite lunitor_runitor_identity ;
           rewrite runitor_rwhisker ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
           rewrite id2_right ;
           rewrite <- rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite <- lunitor_lwhisker ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
           rewrite lwhisker_id2 ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite runitor_triangle ;
           rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
           apply idpath).

x: fiber
is_invertible_2cell
  (lunitor (pr1 ((pr111 to_fiber_disp_map_counit) x)),,
   disp_map_counit_inv_left_data_subproof x)

B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
x, y: fiber
f: fiber ⟦ x, y ⟧
psnaturality_of
  (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv
     to_fiber_disp_map_counit) f

  Transparent comp_psfunctor strict_fiber_bicat.

b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
invertible_modification
  (comp_pstrans to_fiber_disp_map_counit_inv
     to_fiber_disp_map_counit)
  (id_pstrans (id_psfunctor fiber))

 exact disp_map_counit_inv_left_is_modification.
  Defined.

  (**
   7. The biequivalence
   *)
    
B: bicat
D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
is_biequivalence to_fiber_disp_map

D: arrow_subbicat B
b: B
DD:= disp_map_bicat_to_disp_bicat D: disp_bicat B
slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
is_biequivalence to_fiber_disp_map

slice:= disp_map_slice_bicat D b: bicat
fiber:= strict_fiber_bicat DD
  (arrow_subbicat_local_iso_cleaving D) b: bicat
psfunctor fiber slice

  (comp_psfunctor ?G to_fiber_disp_map)
